summary: Regression pass on IntelligenceOS backend after main-agent's 3 fixes. Full pytest suite: 39/39 PASSED in 64s. All 3 previously-critical bugs are confirmed fixed: (FIX 1) route ordering — GET /api/thesis/living now returns the caller's living_theses; ?ticker=AAPL filter works; legacy handler moved to /api/thesis/legacy/{ticker} and still responds 200. (FIX 2) POST /api/alerts returns 200 with a JSON-serialisable rule (no _id). (FIX 3) POST /api/journal returns 200 (no _id); downstream list, postmortem and /journal/analyze (GPT-5.2) all succeed. Living Thesis check flow verified via test_thesis_check_runs_ai — POST /thesis/living/{id}/check returns assumptions with status ∈ {intact,at_risk,broken} and non-empty reasoning. Emergent LLM (GPT-5.2) integration remains healthy across all 8 agent endpoints. yfinance flows all green in this run.

minor.issue: Cookie set with samesite='none' and secure=True; only usable over HTTPS. Not exercised end-to-end (no live Google session). Bearer JWT fallback works — unchanged from iter_1.
yfinance intermittently returns price=None under rate-limit. Endpoint still 200s; 60s TTL. Consider longer TTL / stale-while-revalidate.

action_items: No backend action items — all 3 iter_1 CRITICAL fixes verified. Safe to proceed with frontend integration verification if desired.
Optional: apply _strip_id helper across the codebase (create_thesis legacy is fixed, but a shared helper would prevent recurrence).
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering fix is correct — legacy endpoint moved to /thesis/legacy/{ticker} so the more-specific /thesis/living now resolves first.

_id-strip pattern is now consistent in create_alert, create_journal, create_thesis (legacy). Consider extracting into `def _strip_id(d): return {k:v for k,v in d.items() if k != '_id'}` for reuse (still duplicated inline).
server.py is still ~1113 lines mixing auth/market/portfolio/thesis/journal/agents/RAG/graph — splitting into routers per domain remains recommended.
yfinance calls are still synchronous inside async endpoints; wrap in run_in_executor for production.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest session creates a fresh user + 3 portfolio holdings (AAPL/MSFT/NVDA) + watchlist add (AMD) + Living Thesis v1+v2 for AAPL + 2 journal entries. All prefixed TEST_ where applicable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green (39/39). If a frontend/UI test pass is next, credentials are created dynamically via /api/auth/signup; the app returns {token, user} (JWT bearer). Focus areas for UI: Living Thesis list page (was previously empty because of the shadow bug — now fixed), Alerts creation form, and Decision Journal creation + /analyze view. All AI agent responses use GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key and take 5–30s per call — allow generous timeouts.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — regression pass confirmed all 3 fixes from iteration_1 are in place: (1) @api.get('/thesis/{ticker}') renamed to @api.get('/thesis/legacy/{ticker}') at server.py:496 so it no longer shadows the /thesis/living list route; (2)(3)(4) create_alert, create_journal, create_thesis all strip Mongo's _id from the response payload before returning.
